---
title: "06_dydid_v5_plots_descriptive"
author: Tyler L. McIntosh
date: last-modified
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    html-math-method: katex
    css: styles.css
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    toc-title: Contents
    toc-location: right
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
---


# Setup for analysis

``` {r setupchunk}
#| echo: true
#| message: false
#| warning: false
#| results: 'hide'

rm(list = ls())

if(!requireNamespace("here", quietly = TRUE)) {
  install.packages("here")
}
library(here)

source(here::here("utils", "functions.R"))


install_load_packages(c(
  "tidyverse",
  "tictoc",
  "glue",
  "fixest",
  "arrow"
))

dir_figs <- here::here('figs', "GEE_resilience_v6_operational_ss500_ts50000")
dir_results <- here::here('results')
dir_figs_descriptive <- here::here(dir_figs, 'descriptive')
dir_ensure(c(dir_figs,
             dir_results,
             dir_figs_descriptive))

seed = 1234
set.seed(seed)


```


```{r}


dir_all <- file.path(dir_results, 'descriptive', "all")

trajectory_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_all, "event_time_trajectory.parquet")
)

descriptive_registry_tbl <- arrow::read_parquet(
  file.path(dir_all, "run_registry.parquet")
)


```


```{r}

`%||%` <- function(x, y) {
  if (is.null(x)) y else x
}

apply_saved_filters <- function(df, filters = list()) {
  if (length(filters) == 0) {
    return(df)
  }
  
  for (nm in names(filters)) {
    if (!nm %in% names(df)) {
      stop("Filter column not found in data: ", nm)
    }
    
    vals <- filters[[nm]]
    
    if (is.null(vals)) {
      next
    }
    
    if (length(vals) == 1 && is.na(vals)) {
      df <- df |>
        dplyr::filter(is.na(.data[[nm]]))
    } else {
      df <- df |>
        dplyr::filter(.data[[nm]] %in% vals)
    }
  }
  
  df
}

format_n_label <- function(x, prefix = "n") {
  x <- unique(stats::na.omit(x))
  
  if (length(x) == 0) {
    return(paste0(prefix, "=NA"))
  }
  
  if (length(x) == 1) {
    return(paste0(prefix, "=", format(x, big.mark = ",")))
  }
  
  paste0(
    prefix, "=",
    format(min(x), big.mark = ","),
    "–",
    format(max(x), big.mark = ",")
  )
}

make_legend_labels_with_n_descriptive <- function(df,
                                                  var,
                                                  n_pt_col = "n_ptids",
                                                  n_event_col = "n_fireids") {
  if (is.null(var)) {
    return(NULL)
  }
  
  if (!var %in% names(df)) {
    stop("Legend variable not found in data: ", var)
  }
  
  lbl_tbl <- df |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      .data[[var]],
      subgroup_run_id,
      .data[[n_pt_col]],
      .data[[n_event_col]]
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[var]]) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      n_pt_lab = format_n_label(.data[[n_pt_col]], prefix = "pts"),
      n_event_lab = format_n_label(.data[[n_event_col]], prefix = "events"),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      label = paste0(.data[[var]], " (", n_pt_lab, ", ", n_event_lab, ")")
    )
  
  out <- lbl_tbl$label
  names(out) <- lbl_tbl[[var]]
  out
}

build_descriptive_caption <- function(filters,
                                      y_var = "mean_outcome",
                                      uncertainty = "none",
                                      uncertainty_level = 0.95,
                                      n_min_ptids_event = 0,
                                      n_min_fireids_event = 0,
                                      n_min_ptids_subgroup = 0,
                                      n_min_fireids_subgroup = 0) {
  pct <- round(uncertainty_level * 100)
  
  uncertainty_line <- dplyr::case_when(
    uncertainty == "none" ~ "No uncertainty band shown",
    uncertainty == "sd" ~ "Bands show +/- 1 SD",
    uncertainty == "se" ~ "Bands show +/- 1 SE",
    uncertainty == "ci" ~ paste0("Bands show ", pct, "% CI around the mean"),
    TRUE ~ paste0("Uncertainty mode: ", uncertainty)
  )
  
  base_lines <- c(
    paste0("Descriptive event-time trajectories (y = ", y_var, ")"),
    uncertainty_line,
    paste0(
      "Event-time support filter: ",
      format(n_min_ptids_event, big.mark = ","), " pts, ",
      format(n_min_fireids_event, big.mark = ","), " events"
    ),
    paste0(
      "Subgroup support filter: ",
      format(n_min_ptids_subgroup, big.mark = ","), " pts, ",
      format(n_min_fireids_subgroup, big.mark = ","), " events"
    )
  )
  
  if (length(filters) > 0) {
    filter_lines <- purrr::imap_chr(
      filters,
      \(v, nm) {
        if (is.null(v)) {
          return(paste0(nm, ": NULL"))
        }
        
        if (length(v) == 1 && is.na(v)) {
          return(paste0(nm, ": NA"))
        }
        
        paste0(nm, ": ", paste(as.character(v), collapse = ", "))
      }
    )
    
    base_lines <- c(base_lines, filter_lines)
  }
  
  paste(base_lines, collapse = "\n")
}

plot_saved_descriptive_general <- function(descriptive_tbl,
                                           filters = list(),
                                           y_var = "mean_outcome",
                                           uncertainty = c("none", "sd", "se", "ci"),
                                           uncertainty_style = c("ribbon", "lines"),
                                           color_var = NULL,
                                           linetype_var = NULL,
                                           facet_var = NULL,
                                           facet_ncol = NULL,
                                           facet_scales = "fixed",
                                           title = NULL,
                                           subtitle = NULL,
                                           caption = NULL,
                                           baseline = 0,
                                           xlim = NULL,
                                           ylim = NULL,
                                           color_values = NULL,
                                           linetype_values = NULL,
                                           legend_title_color = NULL,
                                           legend_title_linetype = NULL,
                                           show_n = TRUE,
                                           n_legend_var = NULL,
                                           n_min_ptids_event = 0,
                                           n_min_fireids_event = 0,
                                           n_min_ptids_subgroup = 0,
                                           n_min_fireids_subgroup = 0,
                                           drop_na_y = TRUE,
                                           line_size = 0.9,
                                           point_size = 1.8,
                                           ribbon_alpha = 0.18,
                                           uncertainty_line_alpha = 0.7,
                                           uncertainty_level = 0.95) {
  
  uncertainty <- match.arg(uncertainty)
  uncertainty_style <- match.arg(uncertainty_style)
  
  needed_cols <- c(
    "event_time",
    y_var,
    "n_rows",
    "n_ptids",
    "n_fireids",
    "subgroup_run_id",
    "descriptive_run_id"
  )
  
  missing_needed <- setdiff(needed_cols, names(descriptive_tbl))
  if (length(missing_needed) > 0) {
    stop(
      "descriptive_tbl is missing required columns: ",
      paste(missing_needed, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  
  aesthetic_vars <- c(color_var, linetype_var, facet_var)
  aesthetic_vars <- stats::na.omit(aesthetic_vars)
  missing_aes <- setdiff(aesthetic_vars, names(descriptive_tbl))
  if (length(missing_aes) > 0) {
    stop(
      "These aesthetic columns are missing from descriptive_tbl: ",
      paste(missing_aes, collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  
  d <- descriptive_tbl |>
    apply_saved_filters(filters = filters) |>
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$event_time))
  
  if (drop_na_y) {
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[y_var]]))
  }
  
  if (!is.null(xlim)) {
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::filter(.data$event_time >= xlim[1], .data$event_time <= xlim[2])
  }
  
  subgroup_keep <- d |>
    dplyr::distinct(
      subgroup_run_id,
      n_ptids,
      n_fireids
    ) |>
    dplyr::group_by(subgroup_run_id) |>
    dplyr::summarise(
      subgroup_n_ptids = max(.data$n_ptids, na.rm = TRUE),
      subgroup_n_fireids = if (all(is.na(.data$n_fireids))) NA_integer_ else max(.data$n_fireids, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      keep_subgroup =
        .data$subgroup_n_ptids >= n_min_ptids_subgroup &
        (
          is.na(.data$subgroup_n_fireids) |
            .data$subgroup_n_fireids >= n_min_fireids_subgroup
        )
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$keep_subgroup) |>
    dplyr::pull(.data$subgroup_run_id)
  
  d <- d |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$subgroup_run_id %in% subgroup_keep) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      keep_event_time =
        .data$n_ptids >= n_min_ptids_event &
        (
          is.na(.data$n_fireids) |
            .data$n_fireids >= n_min_fireids_event
        )
    ) |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$keep_event_time)
  
  if (nrow(d) == 0) {
    caption_auto <- build_descriptive_caption(
      filters = filters,
      y_var = y_var,
      uncertainty = uncertainty,
      uncertainty_level = uncertainty_level,
      n_min_ptids_event = n_min_ptids_event,
      n_min_fireids_event = n_min_fireids_event,
      n_min_ptids_subgroup = n_min_ptids_subgroup,
      n_min_fireids_subgroup = n_min_fireids_subgroup
    )
    
    if (!is.null(caption)) {
      caption_auto <- paste(caption_auto, caption, sep = "\n")
    }
    
    p <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
      ggplot2::geom_blank() +
      ggplot2::geom_vline(
        xintercept = baseline,
        linewidth = 0.6,
        linetype = "dotted",
        color = "red"
      ) +
      ggplot2::labs(
        title = title,
        subtitle = subtitle,
        caption = caption_auto,
        x = "Event time",
        y = y_var
      ) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
        legend.position = "none"
      )
    
    if (!is.null(xlim) || !is.null(ylim)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::coord_cartesian(xlim = xlim, ylim = ylim)
    }
    
    return(p)
  }
  
  d <- d |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      se_outcome = .data$sd_outcome / sqrt(.data$n_rows),
      ci_mult = stats::qnorm(1 - (1 - uncertainty_level) / 2),
      ymin = dplyr::case_when(
        uncertainty == "sd" ~ .data[[y_var]] - .data$sd_outcome,
        uncertainty == "se" ~ .data[[y_var]] - .data$se_outcome,
        uncertainty == "ci" ~ .data[[y_var]] - .data$ci_mult * .data$se_outcome,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      ),
      ymax = dplyr::case_when(
        uncertainty == "sd" ~ .data[[y_var]] + .data$sd_outcome,
        uncertainty == "se" ~ .data[[y_var]] + .data$se_outcome,
        uncertainty == "ci" ~ .data[[y_var]] + .data$ci_mult * .data$se_outcome,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::arrange(.data$event_time)
  
  caption_auto <- build_descriptive_caption(
    filters = filters,
    y_var = y_var,
    uncertainty = uncertainty,
    uncertainty_level = uncertainty_level,
    n_min_ptids_event = n_min_ptids_event,
    n_min_fireids_event = n_min_fireids_event,
    n_min_ptids_subgroup = n_min_ptids_subgroup,
    n_min_fireids_subgroup = n_min_fireids_subgroup
  )
  
  if (!is.null(caption)) {
    caption_auto <- paste(caption_auto, caption, sep = "\n")
  }
  
  if (is.null(n_legend_var)) {
    n_legend_var <- color_var %||% linetype_var
  }
  
  color_values_plot <- NULL
  linetype_values_plot <- NULL
  color_breaks <- NULL
  linetype_breaks <- NULL
  
  if (!is.null(color_var)) {
    color_labels <- if (show_n && identical(n_legend_var, color_var)) {
      make_legend_labels_with_n_descriptive(d, color_var)
    } else {
      vals <- d |>
        dplyr::distinct(.data[[color_var]]) |>
        dplyr::pull(.data[[color_var]]) |>
        as.character()
      stats::setNames(vals, vals)
    }
    
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        color_plot = dplyr::recode(as.character(.data[[color_var]]), !!!color_labels)
      )
    
    color_breaks <- unname(color_labels)
    
    if (!is.null(color_values)) {
      if (is.null(names(color_values))) {
        stop("color_values must be a named vector.")
      }
      
      missing_color_names <- setdiff(names(color_labels), names(color_values))
      if (length(missing_color_names) > 0) {
        stop(
          "color_values is missing names for: ",
          paste(missing_color_names, collapse = ", ")
        )
      }
      
      color_values_plot <- color_values[names(color_labels)]
      names(color_values_plot) <- unname(color_labels)
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
    linetype_labels <- if (show_n && identical(n_legend_var, linetype_var)) {
      make_legend_labels_with_n_descriptive(d, linetype_var)
    } else {
      vals <- d |>
        dplyr::distinct(.data[[linetype_var]]) |>
        dplyr::pull(.data[[linetype_var]]) |>
        as.character()
      stats::setNames(vals, vals)
    }
    
    d <- d |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        linetype_plot = dplyr::recode(as.character(.data[[linetype_var]]), !!!linetype_labels)
      )
    
    linetype_breaks <- unname(linetype_labels)
    
    if (!is.null(linetype_values)) {
      if (is.null(names(linetype_values))) {
        stop("linetype_values must be a named vector.")
      }
      
      missing_lty_names <- setdiff(names(linetype_labels), names(linetype_values))
      if (length(missing_lty_names) > 0) {
        stop(
          "linetype_values is missing names for: ",
          paste(missing_lty_names, collapse = ", ")
        )
      }
      
      linetype_values_plot <- linetype_values[names(linetype_labels)]
      names(linetype_values_plot) <- unname(linetype_labels)
    }
  }
  
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    d,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = .data$event_time,
      y = .data[[y_var]],
      group = .data$descriptive_run_id
    )
  )
  
  if (uncertainty != "none" && uncertainty_style == "ribbon") {
    if (!is.null(color_var)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
          ggplot2::aes(
            ymin = .data$ymin,
            ymax = .data$ymax,
            fill = .data$color_plot
          ),
          alpha = ribbon_alpha,
          linewidth = 0,
          show.legend = FALSE
        )
    } else {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_ribbon(
          ggplot2::aes(
            ymin = .data$ymin,
            ymax = .data$ymax
          ),
          alpha = ribbon_alpha,
          linewidth = 0
        )
    }
  }
  
  if (uncertainty != "none" && uncertainty_style == "lines") {
    if (!is.null(color_var) && !is.null(linetype_var)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ymin,
            color = .data$color_plot,
            linetype = .data$linetype_plot
          ),
          alpha = uncertainty_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ymax,
            color = .data$color_plot,
            linetype = .data$linetype_plot
          ),
          alpha = uncertainty_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        )
    } else if (!is.null(color_var)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ymin,
            color = .data$color_plot
          ),
          alpha = uncertainty_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ymax,
            color = .data$color_plot
          ),
          alpha = uncertainty_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        )
    } else if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ymin,
            linetype = .data$linetype_plot
          ),
          alpha = uncertainty_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(
            y = .data$ymax,
            linetype = .data$linetype_plot
          ),
          alpha = uncertainty_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        )
    } else {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(y = .data$ymin),
          alpha = uncertainty_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_line(
          ggplot2::aes(y = .data$ymax),
          alpha = uncertainty_line_alpha,
          linewidth = 0.45
        )
    }
  }
  
  if (!is.null(color_var) && !is.null(linetype_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(
          color = .data$color_plot,
          linetype = .data$linetype_plot
        ),
        linewidth = line_size
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(
        ggplot2::aes(color = .data$color_plot),
        size = point_size
      )
  } else if (!is.null(color_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(color = .data$color_plot),
        linewidth = line_size
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(
        ggplot2::aes(color = .data$color_plot),
        size = point_size
      )
  } else if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        ggplot2::aes(linetype = .data$linetype_plot),
        linewidth = line_size
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = point_size)
  } else {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_line(linewidth = line_size) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(size = point_size)
  }
  
  p <- p +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
      xintercept = 0,
      linewidth = 0.6,
      linetype = "dotted",
      color = "red"
    ) +
    ggplot2::geom_vline(
      xintercept = baseline,
      linewidth = 0.6,
      linetype = "dotted",
      color = "gray40"
    )
  
  if (!is.null(facet_var)) {
    facet_formula <- stats::as.formula(paste("~", facet_var))
    
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::facet_wrap(
        facets = facet_formula,
        ncol = facet_ncol,
        scales = facet_scales
      )
  }
  
  if (!is.null(color_var) && !is.null(color_values_plot)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::scale_color_manual(
        values = color_values_plot,
        breaks = color_breaks,
        name = legend_title_color %||% color_var
      )
    
    if (uncertainty != "none" && uncertainty_style == "ribbon") {
      p <- p +
        ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
          values = color_values_plot,
          breaks = color_breaks,
          guide = "none"
        )
    }
  } else if (!is.null(color_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::labs(color = legend_title_color %||% color_var)
  }
  
  if (!is.null(linetype_var) && !is.null(linetype_values_plot)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::scale_linetype_manual(
        values = linetype_values_plot,
        breaks = linetype_breaks,
        name = legend_title_linetype %||% linetype_var
      )
  } else if (!is.null(linetype_var)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::labs(linetype = legend_title_linetype %||% linetype_var)
  }
  
  y_label <- dplyr::case_when(
    y_var == "mean_outcome" ~ "Mean outcome",
    y_var == "sd_outcome" ~ "SD of outcome",
    TRUE ~ y_var
  )
  
  p <- p +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = title,
      subtitle = subtitle,
      caption = caption_auto,
      x = "Event time",
      y = y_label
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      panel.grid.minor = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(face = "bold")
    )
  
  if (!is.null(xlim) || !is.null(ylim)) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::coord_cartesian(
        xlim = xlim,
        ylim = ylim
      )
  }
  
  p
}
```

```{r}


make_named_palette <- function(levels,
                               palette = "Okabe-Ito") {
  levels <- unique(as.character(levels))
  
  vals <- grDevices::palette.colors(
    length(levels),
    palette = palette
  )
  
  names(vals) <- levels
  
  vals
}

make_named_palette_from_tbl <- function(tbl,
                                        var,
                                        palette = "Okabe-Ito",
                                        levels = NULL,
                                        sort_levels = TRUE) {
  if (!var %in% names(tbl)) {
    stop("Column not found in table: ", var)
  }
  
  if (is.null(levels)) {
    levels <- tbl |>
      dplyr::distinct(.data[[var]]) |>
      dplyr::pull(.data[[var]]) |>
      as.character()
    
    if (sort_levels) {
      levels <- sort(levels)
    }
  } else {
    levels <- as.character(levels)
  }
  
  if (length(levels) == 0) {
    stop("No levels found for palette.")
  }
  
  vals <- grDevices::palette.colors(
    n = length(levels),
    palette = palette
  )
  
  names(vals) <- levels
  
  vals
}

```



```{r}


subgroup_pal <- c(
  f   = "red3",
  bf  = "forestgreen",
  df  = "goldenrod2",
  bdf = "purple"
)

series_lty <- c(
  treated = "solid",
  control_mock = "blank"
)



for(analysis_id in unique(trajectory_tbl$analysis_id)) {
  
  p <- plot_saved_descriptive_general(
    descriptive_tbl = trajectory_tbl,
    filters = list(
      analysis_id = analysis_id,
      outcome = "rap_tree",
      group_id = "b10_pdsin3t1",
      model_id = "sunab_main"
    ),
    y_var = "mean_outcome",
    uncertainty = "se",
    uncertainty_style = "ribbon",
    color_var = "subgroup",
    color_values = subgroup_pal,
    linetype_var = "series",
    linetype_values = series_lty,
    facet_var = "outcome",
    facet_ncol = 2,
    baseline = -6,
    xlim = c(-15, 20),
    title = glue::glue("Descriptive trajectories: {analysis_id}")
  )
  
  ggsave(here::here(dir_figs_descriptive, glue::glue("trajectories_{analysis_id}.png")),
         units = "px",
         width = 4000,
         height = 2000)
}


```


# Check vs raw data

```{r}

test <- arrow::read_parquet(here(dir_derived, 'parquet', 'dats_long_sierranevada.parquet'))

set_cd_groups <- function(df,
                          b_nm,
                          d_nm,
                          cd_nm,
                          b_threshold,
                          d_threshold) {
  
  if(d_threshold < 0) {
    df_new <- df |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        "{cd_nm}" := dplyr::case_when(
          .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >  d_threshold ~ "f",
          .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >  d_threshold ~ "bf",
          .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <= d_threshold ~ "df",
          .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <= d_threshold ~ "bdf",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
  } else {
    df_new <- df |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        "{cd_nm}" := dplyr::case_when(
          .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <  d_threshold ~ "f",
          .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] <  d_threshold ~ "bf",
          .data[[b_nm]] <  b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >= d_threshold ~ "df",
          .data[[b_nm]] >= b_threshold & fire == 1 & .data[[d_nm]] >= d_threshold ~ "bdf",
          TRUE ~ NA_character_
        )
      )
    
  }
  
  df_new <- df_new |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      "{cd_nm}" := forcats::fct_relevel(.data[[cd_nm]], "f")
    )
  
  return(df_new)
}


summary_data <- test |>
  set_cd_groups(
    b_nm = "biotic_relaxedforestnorm_5_yrs_prior_sum_yot",
    d_nm = "pdsi_annual_5_yrs_prior_threshold_n3_yot",
    cd_nm = "b10_pdsin3t1",
    b_threshold = 10,
    d_threshold = 1
  ) |>
  filter(year >= 1997) |>
  mutate(use_tv_covars = ifelse(Time_to_Treatment <= -5 & Time_to_Treatment <= 0, 0, 1)) |>
    group_by(b10_pdsin3t1, year_from_fire_index) |>
    summarise(
      q25_rap    = quantile(rap_tree, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_rap = median(rap_tree, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_rap = mean(rap_tree, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75_rap    = quantile(rap_tree, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      q25_vcf    = quantile(vcf_tree, 0.25, na.rm = TRUE),
      median_vcf = median(vcf_tree, na.rm = TRUE),
      q75_vcf    = quantile(vcf_tree, 0.75, na.rm = TRUE),
      mean_vcf = mean(vcf_tree, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

never_burned <- summary_data |>
    filter(is.na(b10_pdsin3t1)) |>
    select(year_from_fire_index, median_rap, median_vcf)


ggplot(summary_data) +
  geom_line(aes(x = year_from_fire_index, y = median_rap, color = b10_pdsin3t1))

ggplot(summary_data) +
  geom_line(aes(x = year_from_fire_index, y = mean_rap, color = b10_pdsin3t1))

ggplot(summary_data) +
  geom_line(aes(x = year_from_fire_index, y = median_vcf, color = b10_pdsin3t1))



```
